---
applyTo: '**/*.md'
---
# Markdown Instructions

- Keep `README.md`, `AGENTS.md`, and `docs/` synchronized with the actual implementation.
- Document current behavior only; do not present experimental or incomplete paths as finished features.
- Prefer short, practical sections over long narrative prose.
- When structure, UI behavior, or design conventions change, update the relevant docs in the same pass.
- Use `AGENTS.md` uppercase in this repo to match the adopted bootstrap convention.
